svg.title: Retail Tower OS · platform structure & request flow
svg.desc: Animated structure diagram showing dashboard and POS clients travelling through the NestJS API, guard chain (auth → tenant → roles), service layer with RLS-enforced PostgreSQL, BullMQ outbox into Redis, and the worker app. Side rails surface contracts, shared packages, and observability.

g.text: Retail Tower OS · structure & request flow
Clients ➜ API ingress ➜ guard chain ➜ service layer + RLS ➜ PostgreSQL · outbox ➜ Redis ➜ worker — governed by contracts, shared, and observability.
helmet · cookies · request-id · Zod validation · OpenAPI loader
auth · tenants · catalog · sales · inventory · audit · outbox
tenant-scoped Drizzle · RLS at the database boundary
